client_1.comment: Opa opa opa pa, as promised 😄 Good afternoon, we were in Sharm in March. I'd like to express my gratitude to the Menem Tours team for such an awesome desert safari excursion on ATVs and buggies 🙃, as well as a parachute flight and banana boat ride)))) Everything went wonderfully! And the prices are quite reasonable, compared to the guide's prices!

client_2.comment: Went to the pyramids. Very nice price: $55 per person, while through the hotel guide it was $120, that is, the difference is more than two times. The bus arrived on time, everything was organized at a satisfactory level. Top price/quality.

client_3.comment: We joined the Ras Mohammed and Dohab tour. Abdul picked us up from our hotel in a private vehicle, and the service was excellent. The tour was full of fun and included delicious food. If you're coming to Sham El Sheikh, all you have to do is trust this company. They'll take care of everything else. Their prices are really cheap.

client_4.comment: We took four excursions, and they all went perfectly, from the always-punctual hotel transfers to the always-kind guides. Highly recommended!

client_5.comment: Menem is very welcoming and, above all, very accommodating. He offers high-quality services and excellent follow-up. I asked him to organize three outings for four people with a few specific requests. The service providers were aware of my changes, and Menem contacted me in the evening to check in. A huge thank you; our vacation was even better thanks to you.

hero_text: Find what's make you happy anytime, anywhere
Trusted_by_companies_across_Middle_East: Trusted by companies across Middle East
redSeaColors: Where the Red Sea shows its true colors
liveTheSea: Don’t just watch the sea. Live it.
bookInstantConfirmation: Book now and get instant confirmation with best price guarantee
faq1_answer: Yes, you can cancel your booking within 24 hours for a full refund.
faq2_answer: Yes, we provide special discounts for groups of 5 people or more.
faq3_answer: Travel insurance is optional and can be added during checkout.
faq4_question: How do I receive my tickets?
faq4_answer: Your tickets will be sent instantly to your email after payment confirmation.
sharmOldMarketAddress: Sharm Alshikh - Old Market – In front of Al Sahaba Mosque
getThereInStyle: Don't just get there, get there in style.
deepAdventure: Not Everyone Dares to Go This Deep
petraTour: Petra Tour – Discover the Lost City of Stone
rasMohammedTour: Rass Mohammed Tour – Dive into the Red Sea Paradise
safariAdventureTour: Safari Adventure – Discover the Desert Like Never Before
dolphinHouseTour: Dolphin House – Swim with Dolphins in the Red Sea
boatTrip: Boat Trip – Sail the Crystal Waters of the Red Sea
divingAdventure: Diving Adventure – Explore the Red Sea Underwater World
petraDescription1: Step into one of the New Seven Wonders of the World and explore the breathtaking city of Petra.
petraDescription2: Walk through the legendary Siq Canyon until the magical moment when the famous Treasury (Al-Khazneh) appears before your eyes. Continue your journey through ancient temples, royal tombs, and hidden pathways carved into the rose-red mountains over 2,000 years ago.
petraDescription3: This unforgettable experience combines history, adventure, and stunning views in one of the most extraordinary places on Earth.
rasMohammedDescription1: Discover the breathtaking beauty of Ras Mohammed National Park, one of the most famous nature reserves in Egypt and a true paradise for nature lovers.
rasMohammedDescription2: Located at the southern tip of the Sinai Peninsula, this spectacular park is where the desert meets the crystal-clear waters of the Red Sea. Enjoy snorkeling among vibrant coral reefs, colorful fish, and some of the richest marine ecosystems in the world.
rasMohammedDescription3: Relax on stunning beaches, swim in turquoise lagoons, and experience one of the most unforgettable natural wonders in the region.
safariDescription1: Get ready for an unforgettable adventure in the heart of the Sinai Desert.
safariDescription2: Experience the thrill of riding quad bikes across golden sand dunes, explore breathtaking desert landscapes, and visit a traditional Bedouin camp to discover authentic desert culture.
safariDescription3: Watch the magical sunset over the mountains, enjoy a relaxing Bedouin atmosphere, and create memories that will last a lifetime.
dolphinDescription1: Experience one of the most magical moments in the Red Sea — swimming alongside wild dolphins in their natural habitat.
dolphinDescription2: Join an unforgettable boat trip to the famous Dolphin House (Sha'ab Samadai Reef), where dolphins are often seen playing and swimming freely in the crystal-clear water.
dolphinDescription3: Enjoy snorkeling in beautiful coral reefs, relax on the boat under the sun, and if you’re lucky, you might even swim next to dolphins in one of the most incredible marine experiences in the world.
boatDescription1: Enjoy a relaxing day sailing across the beautiful waters of the Red Sea.
boatDescription2: This boat trip takes you to some of the most stunning snorkeling spots, where you can swim in crystal-clear water and explore vibrant coral reefs filled with colorful marine life. Relax on deck, soak up the sun, and enjoy the breathtaking views of the sea.
boatDescription3: It’s the perfect experience for travelers looking to combine relaxation, swimming, and adventure in one unforgettable day.
divingDescription1: Dive into the crystal-clear waters of the Red Sea and discover one of the most spectacular underwater worlds on the planet.
divingDescription2: Whether you're a first-time diver or an experienced explorer, this diving experience will take you to stunning coral reefs filled with colorful fish, vibrant marine life, and breathtaking underwater landscapes.
divingDescription3: With professional instructors and modern equipment, you’ll safely explore the magical beauty hidden beneath the surface.
rasMohammedInclude1: Entrance to Ras Mohammed National Park
rasMohammedInclude3: Snorkeling stops at the best coral reef spots
petraInclude3: Free time to explore and take photos
safariInclude1: Quad bike or buggy ride through the desert
safariInclude3: Visit to a traditional Bedouin camp
dolphinInclude1: Boat trip to Dolphin House reef
dolphinInclude2: Snorkeling stops in coral reef areas
dolphinInclude4: Lunch and soft drinks on board
boatInclude1: Boat trip in the Red Sea
boatInclude4: Lunch and soft drinks on board
divingInclude3: Boat trip to the best diving spots
divingInclude4: One or two guided dives (depending on package)
divingInclude5: Lunch and soft drinks on the boat
rasMohammedGoodToKnow3: Snorkeling gear can be rented if needed
rasMohammedGoodToKnow4: Suitable for beginners and experienced swimmers
alBatraaGoodToKnow3: Not suitable for travelers with serious mobility issues
safariGoodToKnow3: Closed shoes are recommended for riding
dolphinGoodToKnow1: Dolphin sightings cannot be guaranteed (they are wild animals)
dolphinGoodToKnow2: Suitable for beginners and experienced swimmers
divingGoodToKnow1: No previous diving experience required for beginners
divingGoodToKnow2: Minimum age may apply depending on the program
divingGoodToKnow4: Diving depth depends on experience level
cancellationPolicy1: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure.
howToBookDetail: Just fill out the order form on the tour page, and then click the “Book This tour” button. Once you do this, we will send you a confirmation email that your reservation has been confirmed in accordance with the information you sent us. Or contact us by phone.
howToPayDetail: You don’t have to pay until you are here in Sharm El Sheikh already, we will send you our representative to your hotel to give you the receipts and collect the money before your excursions Cash or by Credit Card with add 3% on Total Payment. Or you can visit us at our office.
bookTrip: How can I book a trip?
bookTripDetail: You can easily book through our website or contact us directly on WhatsApp for instant confirmation.
faqTransportAnswer: Yes, most of our experiences include hotel pickup and drop-off within Sharm El Sheikh.
faqBeginnerQuestion: Are the activities suitable for beginners?
faqBeginnerAnswer: Absolutely. Our tours are designed for all experience levels and guided by professionals.
faqBringQuestion: What should I bring with me?
faqBringAnswer: We recommend bringing comfortable clothing, sunscreen, sunglasses, and a camera to capture the moments.
faqSafetyAnswer: Your safety is our priority. All activities are operated by experienced guides and follow safety standards.
faqCancelQuestion: Can I cancel or reschedule my booking?
faqCancelAnswer: Yes, you can contact our team to cancel or reschedule depending on the tour policy.
